title: Dekoni Audio Memory Foam Replacement Ear Pads Compatible with Sennheiser HD800 and HD800S Headphones (Elite Velour)
features: Designed and Tuned for the Sennheiser HD800 and HD800S

reviews.title: Comfortable fit
reviews.text:
They snap on easily. They are a little too thick for my taste though. You almost forget you're wearing the HD800's with the stock ear pads because of how light and thin they are. With the Dekoni's you've got memory foam cushions pushing on the sides of your head the entire time, reminding you of the giant cans on your head. They are even thicker than the pads on my HD820's. Price is a little steep but only $5 more than stock pads.

The materials feel like nice quality, similar to my HD820's. They're just not as comfortable though, in the sense that you don't forget you're wearing them like you do with the stock pads. If you have the patience, I think it's better to order genuine replacement pads from SoundSpares and just wait for them to ship from the UK. Considering the stock pads are about the same price, I think they're the better option.

reviews.title: Comfortable, not a fan of how the sound changes
reviews.text:
More comfortable than the OEM pads. Does changes the soundstage a bit while also changing the sound signature. I do notice the increase in sub-bass and increased midrange as stated in the description of these pads, but not sure if I like the trade-off of a reduced soundstage. For me, the reduced soundstage makes it sounds a bit muffled, and since I like the clear/clean sound of the basic earpads I'm not really a fan of the changes. But I guess if you want to change the sound of your hd800 then it could be good.

[EDIT] I chose to cut off the cover of the pads and used the base HD800 covers instead. I actually like it more. I wouldn't recommend others to cut their pads though as it's irreversible.

reviews.title: A no-brainer improvement for the HD800
reviews.text:
These replace the foam ear pads from your Sennheiser HD800 phones - and they're an obvious purchase for fans of these headphones. It comes delivered in a protective, flip-open box, and the pads themselves are soft and comfortable. It's every bit as nice-fitting as the original pads. But most users will probably need to do a few things to perfect the sound.

1. Adjust the EQ. If you use an HD800, you probably use either an amp or some kind of EQ setup. When you use these pads the first time, you may notice that certain music is too bassy, or has too much treble. You can easily change the sound signature by playing around with the EQ. You'll find that the bass has more presence with the Dekoni pads, but I didn't notice much change with the treble. If, however, you don't use an amp or adjust the EQ, the sound will sound better with the stock Sennheiser pads.

2. The "sticking point." Sennheiser's stock pads are soft and resilient, and designed especially for the HD800. The Dekoni pads sound equally good, but some might find the sheepskin a little "tacky" at first. (I got used to it pretty quickly.) Also, the Dekoni pads are notably more warm-feeling than the stock pads. If either of these are a problem for you, you can upgrade to the Dekoni "fenestrated" pads - or just use the Sennheiser pads.

3. Looks. No question, the leather pads are notably attractive - a real improvement over stock.

4. Installation. While Dekoni includes a plastic tool to help pry the pads, you would be well advised to watch a few videos beforehand. Dekoni didn't include an installation guide.

These pads are a no-brainer improvement over stock.

title: 6 Packs(12 Pieces) in-Ear Monitor Replacement Memory Foam Tips 3mm Earplugs Earbud Cover for Balanced Armatured Headphone T-100(Medium, Yellow)
description:
Inner diameter: 3mm Outer diameter:12.5mmSize: Medium QTY: 6 pairs
NO EAR FATIGUE.
These foam earphone tips are softer than silicone tip material, Great elasticity and recovery make the tips perfectly fit your ear canal, very comfortable.
BETTER COMFORT
Slow-rebound material, uniquely breath-activated earmuffs activated by body temperature, gives you a new experience without irritation or fatigue.
PREMIUM SOUND.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
MORE ISOLATION
With the ear canal properly sealed by the earbud tips, you don't need to increase volume to enjoy music in a noisy environment.
LITTLE USING TIPS
Before wearing earbuds, squeeze the sponge tips with your hands, so they will automatically inflate and perfectly fit your ear canal after wearing. That will create better sound insulation. The memory foam is about 11mm high, the largest diameter is about 12mm, and the inner diameter of the catheter is about 3mm.Made of high-quality, environmentally friendly and non-toxic materials, it has the advantages of softer, slower rebound and more durable. Memory foam is characterized by a slow rebound effect, which can change its own shape with external pressure. From the perspective of earplugs, the ear canal varies from person to person, and the memory foam will change their shape according to the individual's ear canal, making them fit the ear canal best, thus achieving more than ordinary eartips cover good wearing comfort, better noise reduction effect, bring better listening experience. Applicable to the following earplugs: SE series:  SE110/SE112/SE115/SE210/SE215/SE310/SE315/SE420/SE425/SE530/SE535/SE846 E3C/E4C/E5C/E3G/E4G/E500/i3C/i4C/ SC series: SCL3/SCL4/SCL5/
features: 6 Pairs of replacement tips fit on 3mm cavity tube diameter for balanced armatured in-ear monitor.Please measure the outer diameter of your earplug cavity tube before purchasing, and refer to the picture to obtain the appropriate model.
The only earbud tips that adopt separate packaging; each pair is individually packed in its own little baggie; convenient for storage.
Not like other cheap earphone tips, these are high quality memory foam ear bud tips which would not fall apart or disintegrate.
Soft foam earbud tips provide a perfect seal in the ear canal and pure audio with enhanced bass while eliminate the outside noise.
Before wearing, you may need to squeeze the ear tips and put them in your ear and they expand to fit. These are pretty stretchy and stay in place.

reviews.title: Not a quality product
reviews.text: I needed these to fit my Sony earbuds which are always smaller than normal earbuds. I've used Comply in the past and loved them but they're expensive. Should have bought them anyway. These are small plastic tubes inserted into blue memory foam. The tubes don't stretch to wrap around the tip of the earbud the way quality products do and the tubes are apparently not glued to the memory foam as they separate when you're trying to install them.

reviews.title: Hold really well
reviews.text: Really like these foam tips. They hold extremely well in my ears whether I'm hitting hitting the punching bag, jogging or cutting grass.

reviews.title: The quanity you get for the price + the quality is excellent
reviews.text: I like the comfort, quality, and price of these replacement earbuds.  The foam holds up well to use, they never fall off, and they do block out sound around you but not so much you can't hear that someone spoke to you.  The price and quantity is the best on Amazon

reviews.title: Not so great
reviews.text: I bought these as an inexpensive replacement for my ear buds. They took quite a bit of twisting and pushing to get into my ear without feeling like they would fall out. With that, after just a couple days, the outer section broke away from the inner so they no longer fit on the ear bud. I do not recommend purchasing.

reviews.title: Perfect replacement size
reviews.text: Very comfortable, noise isolating, fits my older Phillips SHR 9850 earbuds like new. Like the color because you can tell when they are dirty & need to be replaced.

title: 2 Pack iPhone Earbuds [Apple MFi Certified] Wired in-Ear Stereo Noise Canceling Isolating Lightning Headphones with Built-in Microphone&Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 13 12 SE 11 X 8 7-All iOS
description:
Using the Step
1.Quick and Easy Connection scheme one:After plugging in the headphones, a window will appear, click "Connect with iCloud" to use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets". 2.Connection scheme two: a.The first time you use it, you need to enter the iPhone settings and turn on Bluetooth. b.Bluetooth page: Find "Baets" in Other Devices, click "Baets" to connect(The headset will automatically connect to your device the next time, so you don’t need to do this step again.) Need Attention: It must be connected to Bluetooth for normal use. And it must always be connected to Bluetooth during use.When making or receiving calls, the audio needs to be switched from the speaker to "Baets".

title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.

So in summary, it just works.
